articles.title: 'American Idol' reveals winner – See if Keyla, Hannah or Jordan won - USA Today
articles.description: "American Idol" Top 3 finalist Hannah Harper became the first female country artist to win since Carrie Underwood. See photos of her crowning moment.
articles.content:
May 12, 2026, 8:46 a.m. ET
"American Idol" Top 3 finalists Keyla Richardson, Jordan McCullough and Hannah Harper made it to the May 11 finale. After a three-hour episode featuring a performance by j… [+781 chars]
